---
title: "STI-ENID 2026 Conference"
date: 2026-09-09
author: "ECOOM at University of Antwerp, KU Leuven, and VUB"
author-title: "Organizer"
description: "The 30th Annual International Conference on Science and Technology Indicators explores responsible research futures in Antwerp."
categories:
  - "Related Topic"
tags:
  - "STI indicators"
  - "Research assessment"
  - "Responsible research"
proofread: false
image: "images/sti-enid-2026-homepage.png"
image-alt: "Conference homepage for the 30th STI-ENID Conference"
image-caption: "Screenshot of the STI-ENID 2026 conference homepage. Source: https://www.uantwerpen.be/en/conferences/30th-annual-international-conference-on-science-and-technology-indicators/. Rights: University of Antwerp and STI-ENID 2026 organisers."
toc: true
---

<!-- Source: <https://www.uantwerpen.be/en/conferences/30th-annual-international-conference-on-science-and-technology-indicators/> -->

## Details

- Date: Wednesday, 9 September 2026 to Friday, 11 September 2026
- Location: Antwerp, Belgium
- Registration: <https://www.uantwerpen.be/en/conferences/30th-annual-international-conference-on-science-and-technology-indicators/subscribe-for-updates/>
- Event page: <https://www.uantwerpen.be/en/conferences/30th-annual-international-conference-on-science-and-technology-indicators/>

## About

The 30th Annual STI-ENID Conference is held under the theme "Indicators for a Responsible Research Future" and brings together researchers, policy experts, and practitioners working on science, technology, and innovation indicators.

The programme focuses on how indicators can support diversity, openness, sustainability, and fair international collaboration in research systems, and how assessment approaches can better align with societal needs.
